name: AIDLC Board Sync
description: After an AIDLC task completes, updates the corresponding GitHub issue and project board status.

then.prompt: Read the project config from .kiro/steering/project-config.md. Check if a power is registered with category 'project-management'. If yes, activate that power. Then: 1) Determine which AIDLC unit/story just completed by reading aidlc-docs/aidlc-state.md. 2) Find the matching GitHub issue (search for issues with label 'aidlc:story' whose title contains the story ID). 3) If the completed stage is Code Generation: move the issue to 'Done' on the project board, add a completion comment with summary, and close the issue. 4) If the stage is starting (not complete): move to 'In Progress' and add a status comment. If no project-management power is registered, skip silently.
